text: Provide your company founding year and automotive industry history.
What is your total headcount and ADAS-specific R&D staff count?
Describe your geographic presence and engineering support capability in India.
Provide key leadership and technical team credentials relevant to ADAS.
List your current OEM production programs (named or anonymized) — vehicle program, SOP date, annual volume.
What vehicle classes does your ADAS solution currently support — passenger cars, SUVs, LCVs?
What is your cumulative production volume shipped to date?
How many SOP program launches have you completed? Provide evidence of ramp-up.
Field failure rate / warranty data
Have your customers achieved NCAP ratings using your ADAS stack? Provide details.
What is your current ASPICE level? Has it been third-party audited?
Do you hold IATF 16949 certification for production parts?
Describe your product roadmap over the next 3–5 years.
Which SoC platforms do you support or plan to support — TI TDA4x, Qualcomm SA8x, Renesas R-Car, NXP S32?
Do you support OTA software updates? Describe your OTA architecture — A/B partition, delta, rollback.
What is your compliance roadmap for Euro NCAP 2026, GSR2, and AIS-184 India?
Which SoC platform(s) does your stack currently target? Provide TOPS rating and utilization.
Describe your CPU/GPU/NPU/DSP resource partitioning strategy.
Do you have a Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL)? Has SoC swap been demonstrated or planned?
What is the typical and peak power consumption? Provide thermal envelope.
Describe your memory architecture — DDR bandwidth analysis, shared vs dedicated.
Do you support AUTOSAR Adaptive and/or Classic? Describe integration status.
What OS/RTOS does your stack run on — QNX, Linux, SafeRTOS, or other?
Describe your middleware architecture. Do you support SOME/IP, DDS, or other IPC?
Do you support CAN, CAN-FD, and Automotive Ethernet? Is signal mapping documented?
Describe your data logging and replay framework — capacity, format, lossless capability.
Describe your calibration architecture. Do you support XCP/CCP and provide A2L files?
What is your end-to-end pipeline latency from camera input to actuation output? Provide measured data.
What is your cold boot time to first valid output and full pipeline availability?
What is your warm restart / recovery time after a watchdog reset?
Describe your watchdog implementation — hardware and software levels, escalation logic.
How does your system handle errors and exceptions — graceful degradation, logging?
Describe your sleep/wake behavior and ignition cycle state machine. What is parasitic draw in sleep?
Describe your graceful shutdown sequence — safe state before power loss, NVM write protection.
Which image sensor do you use? Is it AEC-Q100 automotive grade? Provide supplier and model.
What sensor type do you use for forward camera and DMS — RGB, RGB-IR, or NIR? Explain the selection rationale.
What is the sensor resolution and pixel size for each camera?
What is the dynamic range (HDR capability) of your sensor? Provide measured performance.
What is the minimum lux level your system operates at — for forward camera and DMS separately?
Does your sensor support LED Flicker Mitigation (LFM)? Has it been tested against LED traffic signals?
What is the field of view (H × V × D) for each camera?
How do you handle rolling shutter artifacts — global shutter or RS compensation algorithm?
Describe your ISP pipeline — on-chip or external? Is it tunable per environment?
How does your auto exposure and auto white balance perform? What is convergence time in frames?
How does your system handle tunnel entry and exit — adaptation time and behavior?
How does your system handle sun glare and strong backlight conditions?
For DMS: how does your IR cut filter / day-night switching work? What is transition time?
What is the operating temperature range for the sensor and ECU?
What is the IP rating for your camera modules — exterior and cabin?
What EMC/EMI compliance standards have been met? Provide test reports.
What vibration and shock resistance testing has been completed?
Does your stack include lens contamination/blockage detection? What is coverage estimation accuracy?
What is the calibration drift over the product lifetime? Do you have a self-calibration algorithm?
Is your BOM transparent? Do you have a second-source strategy for key components?
Are all components AEC-Q100/Q104 qualified? Are full qualification reports available?
What is your chip shortage contingency plan — buffer stock, multi-fab sourcing?
Do you have a SIL (Software-in-the-Loop) capability? Can the full perception stack run on a PC?
Do you have a HIL (Hardware-in-the-Loop) setup with real ECU and simulated sensors?
Which simulation tools do you integrate with — IPG CarMaker, CARLA, LGSVL, NVIDIA DriveSim?
Do you have a synthetic data generation pipeline — weather, lighting, domain randomization?
Do you support OpenSCENARIO/ASAM scenario generation? How large is your scenario library?
Describe your replay validation framework. Is replay bit-exact or validated-equivalent?
How many total replay hours do you have available? What geographies does it cover?
How is your dataset managed — searchable, version-controlled, metadata-tagged?
Describe your annotation pipeline — tooling, multi-annotator consensus, QA sampling rate.
Do you have an automated edge case data mining pipeline from fleet data?
Do you have an automated regression framework? How frequently does it run?
Is your CI/CD pipeline integrated with build, unit test, and SIL on every commit?
How many automated test scenarios do you have in your regression suite?
What is your test coverage per ADAS function against requirements?
How many test vehicles do you operate and across which markets?
What is your total accumulated real-world test mileage? Which geographies?
Do you have access to a dedicated test track for AEB and LKA testing?
What ASIL level do you target per ADAS function — AEB, LKA, DMS?
Are all safety concepts available — TSC, FSC, HSC, SSC? Can these be shared under NDA?
Describe your ASIL decomposition strategy per function.
Do you have FMEA and FMEDA available — hardware FMEDA with DC and SFF, SW FMEA per module?
What are your diagnostic coverage (DC) metrics per ASIL level?
Describe your safety monitor / supervisor architecture — is it independent from the main pipeline?
What is your fallback mechanism — fail-safe or fail-operational? What is the safe state transition time?
How does your system detect and handle sensor faults — camera open/short/blind/blocked/degraded?
What plausibility checks are applied to all AI outputs — range, rate, consistency?
What is the defined safe state per function and what is the transition time?
Has a SOTIF analysis been completed? Are known and unknown triggering conditions documented?
How many triggering conditions have been cataloged per function?
What AI-specific SOTIF measures do you implement — ODD monitoring, confidence thresholding, fallback?
Do you have fault injection test capability — SW and HW, automated?
Has an independent third-party safety assessment been completed?
Describe your secure boot chain — root of trust, verified boot stages.
How is OTA update security implemented — signed packages, encrypted transport, rollback protection?
How is communication secured internally and externally — TLS/DTLS, SecOC, MACsec?
Describe your key management system — HSM-based, key rotation, per-vehicle keys?
How are debug ports protected in production builds?
Has a TARA (Threat Analysis & Risk Assessment) been completed per ISO 21434?
Has your system been tested against camera spoofing or adversarial attacks?
Has a third-party penetration test been completed? Were findings remediated?
GDPR / privacy compliance (DMS/OMS data)
Data anonymization pipeline
Driver consent management
Describe your SOP readiness — have all production gates been passed (PPAP equivalent)?
Describe your end-of-line calibration process — automation, time per camera, tolerance.
Describe your ECU flashing process for factory and field — reprogramming time?
How do you manage vehicle configuration variants — feature flags, variant coding, ODX-based?
Has your stack been demonstrated on more than one SoC platform? Quantify porting effort.
Describe your OTA update architecture — A/B partition, delta updates, rollback strategy.
Fleet monitoring dashboard
Describe your field log collection and upload strategy — event-triggered, periodic, bandwidth-aware.
What remote diagnostics capability do you offer — DTCs, sensor status, SW version?
What is your spare parts strategy for camera modules — supply period, drop-in replacement?
How do you manage end-of-life and component obsolescence — last-buy notification, migration path?
What are your warranty terms and ADAS-specific liability framework?
What is the IP and model ownership arrangement — source code escrow, trained model rights?
Are you MISRA-C/C++ compliant for safety code? Is a deviation log maintained?
Which static analysis tool do you use? What are the current critical findings?
How do you prevent memory leaks — Valgrind/ASan testing, no dynamic allocation at runtime?
What is your unit test line and branch coverage percentage?
Do you have MC/DC coverage for safety-critical modules as required for ASIL-B+?
Has your system been validated in a long-duration stability test (>72h continuous run)?
How does your system handle CPU overload — graceful frame skip, priority preserved, no crash?
Describe your crash recovery process — auto-restart, crash log, core dump preservation.
Describe your multi-modal alert design — visual, audio, haptic escalation ladder. Is it OEM-configurable?
How is the driver takeover request (TOR) strategy implemented?
How does your warning suppression logic work to avoid nuisance alerts?
Provide your HMI integration API / interface specification — cluster, HUD, audio interfaces.
Does your alert content support multiple languages and regions — icons, text, audio?
What is your readiness for Euro NCAP 2025/2026 protocols — AEB VRU, LSS, OMS, DMS?
What is your readiness for Bharat NCAP / GNCAP — AEB car-to-car and VRU?
What is your AIS-184 (India ADAS regulation) compliance status — AEBS, LDWS?
What is your UN R79 (steering) and UN R131 (AEBS) type approval readiness?
What is your EU General Safety Regulation (GSR2) readiness — ISA, DMS, EDR, AEB?
Which type approval test labs do you partner with? Has pre-approval testing been completed?
How do you handle market-specific adaptation — speed units, sign database, driving-side?
Has HALT/HASS testing been completed? What are the stress margins?
Has thermal cycling testing been completed per AEC-Q100 — temperature range and cycle count?
Has humidity and salt spray corrosion testing been completed?
Has mechanical shock and vibration testing been completed per ISO 16750?
Has radiated emissions testing been completed to CISPR 25 Class 5? Provide test report.
What is your radiated immunity rating per ISO 11452?
What is your ESD immunity rating per ISO 10605?
